items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: Good evening and welcome back to Fieldhouse Files. We’re just two days into NBA free agency, and it’s been slower than normal — while still featuring several splash moves. Nothing was more surprising than the Celtics moving Jaylen Brown to the 76ers on the first full day of free…

items.title: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. It wasn’t going to be easy to find a better pair than Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr. with $15 million. I think getting Dean Wade and Anfernee Simons qualifies.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Lost in last night’s hysteria: Sixers did really good work after opening up the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception. media.description: The Pacers addressed a need by adding Kelly Oubre Jr., but moving into the luxury tax and near the first apron makes patience — and the next decision — even more important.

items.title: PODCAST: Pacers Add Kelly Oubre Jr. — But the East Isn’t Waiting
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: On this episode of the Fieldhouse Files podcast — I discuss how the Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could realistically offer. But on Day 2, they addressed one of their biggest needs by agreeing to a deal with Kelly Oubre Jr., a veteran wing with…

items.title: NEW: Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could offer. On Day 2, they addressed a need by adding Kelly Oubre Jr. — a wing with size, scoring, and an edge for the bench unit.

items.body_excerpt:
NEW: Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could offer. On Day 2, they addressed a need by adding Kelly Oubre Jr. — a wing with size, scoring, and an edge for the bench unit.

It pushes them into the tax and near the first apron.

items.title: The Indiana Pacers will be hard-capped at the first apron after adding Kelly Oubre Jr. using the Non-Taxpayer MLE.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Indiana Pacers will be hard-capped at the first apron after adding Kelly Oubre Jr. using the Non-Taxpayer MLE.

Pending where Oubre's deal comes in at, Indiana should be just over $2M from the first apron. One open roster spot for Indiana.

items.title: Kelly Oubre Jr. played with tremendous intensity for over 5,700 minutes during three years with the Sixers. For someone initially signed to a veteran's minimum deal right before training camp, Oubre gave this team a whole lot.

items.body_excerpt:
Kelly Oubre Jr. played with tremendous intensity for over 5,700 minutes during three years with the Sixers. For someone initially signed to a veteran's minimum deal right before training camp, Oubre gave this team a whole lot.

He has a chance to contend:

media.title: Report: Kelly Oubre Jr. leaves Sixers for two-year, nearly $17 million contract with Indiana Pacers
media.description: In three seasons with the Sixers, Kelly Oubre Jr. averaged 32.1 minutes, 14.9 points, 5.4 rebounds and 1.3 steals across 178 games (150 starts).
